query: SELECT CONCAT(establishmentId, ':', COUNT(*)) as info FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE '9901%' GROUP BY establishmentId UNION SELECT CONCAT(id, ':est') FROM establishments ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 10
